hero.headline: Learn English. Change Your Life.
hero.subheadline: 6-week adult ESL course taught by a Texas state-certified bilingual teacher. Small groups, practical lessons, real results.
hero.seats_warning: Limited seats available — don't miss out!

benefits.heading: Why HablaGood?
benefits.b1_text: Texas state-certified bilingual educator with years of experience teaching adults.
benefits.b2_text: 3 classes per week, 1 hour each — designed to fit around your work and family life.
benefits.b3_text: Practical vocabulary for work, errands, appointments, and everyday conversations.

pricing.heading: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.full_note: Best value — save $130 vs. paying week by week

urgency.heading: Classes Fill Fast
urgency.text: We keep groups small so every student gets personal attention. Once spots are full, registration closes.

about.heading: Meet Your Teacher
about.bio_p1: Maria Rodriguez is a Texas state-certified bilingual teacher with a passion for helping adult learners build confidence in English.
about.bio_p2: With years of classroom experience and deep roots in the community, Maria understands the challenges adult learners face — and knows how to make English approachable, practical, and fun.
about.bio_p3: All lessons are taught in a supportive, bilingual environment where Spanish is always welcome.
about.c1: Texas State Teaching Certificate — Bilingual Education
about.c2: Specialized training in adult ESL instruction
about.c3: Years of experience teaching adult learners
about.philosophy: "Learning a new language as an adult takes courage. My job is to make that journey as comfortable and effective as possible — one practical lesson at a time."

program.heading: Program Details
program.faq1_q: Do I need prior English knowledge?
program.faq1_a: No. This course is designed for complete beginners. All instructions are given in both English and Spanish.
program.faq2_q: What do I need to bring?
program.faq2_a: Just a notebook and pen. All materials are provided by the teacher.
program.faq3_a: We recommend starting from Week 1, but contact us and we'll see what works for your situation.
program.faq4_a: Please contact us directly to discuss any concerns — we want to make sure you're satisfied with the program.
program.faq5_a: Registration is done exclusively via WhatsApp or phone. There are no online forms.

schedule.heading: Class Schedule
schedule.cta_text: Spots are limited. Register today via WhatsApp.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Ready to start your English journey? Reach out — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.no_form_text: We register students personally via WhatsApp or phone so we can answer your questions and make sure the program is a great fit for you.

footer.tagline: English for adults. Taught with care.
